title: SQL: timestamp comparisons do not work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE datetest (low TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, high TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM datetest WHERE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP > COALESCE(low, '2000-01-01 00:00:00') AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP < high;
SELECT * FROM datetest WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM datetest d2 WHERE d2.low < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND d2.high > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
key_bug_features: Timestamp comparisons in SQL queries fail to function
